name: f(x) USD Saving
redeem: Two-layer redemption. Layer 1: fxSAVE to fxSP shares via ERC-4626 redeem() (instant, onchain). Layer 2: fxSP to fxUSD + USDC via either (a) instantRedeem() which charges a withdrawal fee for immediate exit, or (b) a two-step requestRedeem() then cooldown then redeem() that avoids the fee but introduces a delay. A one-step instantRedeemFromFxSave() router function also exists and pays the fee. The underlying collateral is the Stability Pool, which holds fxUSD (a wstETH/WBTC-backed stablecoin) and USDC.
notes: fxSAVE is an ERC-4626 auto-compounding vault built by Concentrator (AladdinDAO) wrapping the f(x) Protocol Stability Pool (fxSP). It compounds wstETH/WBTC rewards from the Stability Pool back into more fxUSD/USDC. Both fxSAVE and fxSP use upgradeable proxy contracts governed by AladdinDAO. The two-layer design adds complexity: a position in fxSAVE is ultimately exposure to the f(x) Protocol's peg-keeping and stability mechanisms. fxUSD can redeem for wstETH/WBTC at oracle price if it depegs. 16 audits across the protocol ecosystem. ~47M fxSAVE supply. The Stability Pool held ~52.4M fxUSD and ~56K USDC at last check.
